message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "kubectl" as kubectl
participant "K8s Auth Proxy" as k8sAuthProxy
participant "K8s API Server" as k8sApiServer
participant "Hydra" as hydra

note over kubectl, right of kubectl: Set the correct cluster with server pointing to the k8auth in the kubectl config
note over kubectl, right of kubectl: GET: https://k8s.dolittle.cloud/api/pods
note over kubectl, right of kubectl: Header: { Authentication: Bearer <token> }

k8sAuthProxy->>hydra: GET: http://hydra.system-auth.svc.cluster.local/userinfo
hydra->>k8sAuthProxy: Status 200 { claims... }
k8sAuthProxy->>k8sApiServer: Impersonate: Hydra-User-Info
k8sAuthProxy->>hydra: GET: <local-cluster-url>/api/pods
hydra->>k8sApiServer: Status 200 (results)
k8sApiServer->>k8sAuthProxy: Status 200 (results)
k8sAuthProxy->>kubectl: Status 200 (results)

alt [If good token]
    k8sAuthProxy->>hydra: Status 200 { claims... }
    k8sAuthProxy->>k8sApiServer: Impersonate: Hydra-User-Info
    k8sAuthProxy->>hydra: GET: <local-cluster-url>/api/pods
    hydra->>k8sApiServer: Status 200 (results)
    k8sApiServer->>k8sAuthProxy: Status 200 (results)
    k8sAuthProxy->>kubectl: Status 200 (results)
else [If bad/no token]
    k8sAuthProxy->>hydra: Status 401
    hydra->>k8sAuthProxy: Status 401
    k8sAuthProxy->>kubectl: Status 401
end

@enduml
